reviews.comment:
Los mejores!!! Los baños siempre impecable, muy buena atención tanto en la playa como en el bar

(Translated by Google)
The best!!! The bathrooms are always spotless, and the service is excellent both on the beach and at the bar.

Parada obligada a mitad de camino !!

(Translated by Google)
A must-see stop halfway through!

reviews.comment:
Siempre estuvo muy limpio, hoy está sucio el plato y la tasa de café sucias realmente es una pena

(Translated by Google)
It was always very clean, but today the plate and coffee cup are dirty, it's a real shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQteGNXVUxnEAE

reviews.comment:
Deberían mejorar el servicio para los momentos pico se espera mucho pero no es en contra del personal que le pone muchas ganas y amabilidad

(Translated by Google)
They should improve the service during peak times; expectations are high, but this isn't a criticism of the staff who are very enthusiastic and friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQteGFHNVpREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención del personal.

(Translated by Google)
Good attention from the staff.

reviews.comment:
Y si, es la parada obligatoria en esta ruta! Unos minutos en la glorieta y a retomar el viaje...

(Translated by Google)
And yes, it's a must-see stop on this route! A few minutes at the roundabout and then back to the journey...

The beach attendants were very friendly and helpful.

Their employees are the best. They just need a bit more dynamism.

reviews.comment:
Playa muy reducida,10 autos estacionados y ya se debe hacer maniobras para poder salir del surtidor...
Sin combustible diesel ultra...

(Translated by Google)
Very small parking area, 10 cars parked and you already have to maneuver just to get out of the pump... No ultra diesel fuel...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdnF2b2dRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención,  baños muy limpios y el restaurante es como para comer algo al paso, muy aseado todo
Lo que es para criticar son los precios, muy caro todo

(Translated by Google)
Good service, very clean restrooms, and the restaurant is great for a quick bite; everything is very clean. The only downside is the prices; everything is very expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtM3I3WGFnEAE
